title: Dead Cold
description: A chilling horror experience set in a world consumed by ice. Survive relentless monsters, endless nights, and the terror of a world that no longer forgives.
body:
**Dead Cold** is a survival horror modpack set in a **frozen**, **dying world**.
**Darkness** is your enemy — monsters grow stronger over time, and **death lurks in every shadow**.

Face the return of **Herobrine**, **Weeping Angels**, and other horrors that stalk the cold night.

**Build**, **survive**, and **pray the light lasts until dawn**.
